name: alert-normalize-email
description: Normalize alert-bearing emails (Snyk vulnerability alerts, AWS Health events, ServiceNow case assignments, generic monitoring mail) from a Gmail: List Messages batch into ops-alerts. Emits the __ops_alert__ envelope so the engine persists them into the ops_alerts triage store with dedup + severity heuristics; non-alert mail is ignored. Pure compute (minimal-node) — pair upstream with Gmail: List Messages and triage via list_ops_alerts / correct_ops_alert_severity.

SOURCE_PREFIX.description: Optional prefix for the emitted source labels (e.g. 'work-' → 'work-snyk-email')

INCLUDE_GENERIC.description: When true, mail matching generic alert keywords (alert/incident/outage/failure in the subject) that no specific parser claims is emitted as source 'generic-email' with severity unclassified
